full_text:
Sima Sui (Zibo) 司馬遂 (子伯)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Sui (司馬遂), styledZibo (子伯). Son of Sima Xun, he was enfeoffed as a King when Sima Yan became Emperor. Sima Sui was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
